channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: NymVPN has released a huge iOS update adding Mixnet Tuning, Server Families, and app icon disguises — but some questions remain around the scale of some improvements
item.description: NymVPN, the VPN app from mixnet developer Nym Technologies, has gotten a major update to its iOS app, adding major connectivity and convenience features

item.title: How To Watch the 2026 FIFA World Cup Semifinals: France vs Spain
item.description: The end of the FIFA Men’s World Cup is nigh. Here’s how to watch the final games and the first ever World Cup halftime show.

item.title: Experts get Google, Microsoft to pull trusted ModHeader with 1.6 million installs after finding it could harvest all kinds of data
item.description: Visited domains were being exfiltrated to a third-party server, seemingly under a Chinese actor's control.

item.title: Boston Dynamics tries using ‘robot dogs’ for deliveries
item.description: Boston Dynamics' robotic quadruped Spot has already found work doing routine factory inspections and patrolling the ruins of Pompeii, but what about deliveries?. The company is testing a new conveyor belt accessory that allows Spot to carry packages from a vehicle and autonomously unload them on a customer's doorstep in an effort to reduce a […]

item.title: 8BitDo’s Nintendo-themed desk gear is the ultimate retro home office upgrade
item.description: A completely NES-cessary addition to your workflow.

item.title: California's MyFirstEV provides a $3,500 instant rebate to first-time buyers
item.description: The Fed dropped the ball, but California's new program will provide up to $3,500 in instant rebates to first-time EV buyers.

item.title: Sony delays its new PS5 fight stick
item.description: Sony is delaying the launch of its FlexStrike fight stick controller for PS5 and PC, which had been set to launch on August 6th, to an unspecified date in the future. The company blames the delayed launch on "unexpected production delays." The original planned launch of the FlexStrike would have lined up with the release […]

item.title: Nomad’s high-end phone accessories are up to 30 percent off
item.description: Premium phone accessory maker Nomad is celebrating its anniversary with discounts on its entire catalog of products. The sale will knocks off up to thirty percent off usual prices and will run through July 20th. We found some particularly good deals from the sale we’d like to draw your attention to. Its Leather Mag Wallet […]

item.title: DeepSeek reportedly in talks to raise $1.5B, then IPO
item.description: DeepSeek, the Chinese large language model developer, is said to be preparing for a 2027 IPO debut as it also looks to raise around $1.5 billion in new funds at a $71 billion valuation.

item.title: 'God of War Laufey will be available on disc' — Sony Santa Monica may have hinted at the game's release window with physical announcement
item.description: Following PlayStation's announcement that it will retire physical game discs, Sony Santa Monica has confirmed that God of War Laufey will be available on disc.

item.title: No, it's not age verification — privacy is the top reason UK children use a VPN
item.description: Independent research commissioned by the UK Government found that between just 7 and 10% of British children use a VPN to bypass age verification

item.title: IPVanish just made OpenVPN almost three times faster on Windows — but there's a catch
item.description: IPVanish has added OpenVPN Data Channel Offload to its Windows app. Internal tests claim downloads up to 196% faster, but the feature can't be used with Scramble.

item.title: The new De'Longhi Rivelia Start is a super-compact coffee maker with a 10-drink menu — including the cold brew we desperately need for sweltering summer days
item.description: The De'Longhi Rivelia Start can brew 10 different drinks at the tap of a button, including cold brew, and create silky milk foam.

item.title: Meta’s Adam Mosseri says AI token budgets could soon be capped per engineer
item.description: Instagram head Adam Mosseri believes companies will eventually need to manage AI token spending the same way they manage payroll or other operating expenses, predicting that engineers could soon face limits on how much they spend using AI tools.

item.title: The new Jackery HomePower 1000 v2 comes in a sleek white colorway. Its also on sale for $300 off.
item.description: The Jackery HomePower 1000 v2 in white is on sale for $579, down from the normal price of $879. That's a $300 discount.

item.title: United is getting rid of the middle seat—sort of. Here’s what travelers will get instead
item.description: Flying in economy could soon feel less cramped as United unveils a new seating layout that replaces the middle passenger with a permanent table. If you’ve ever felt utterly cramped on a plane, United has good news. On Tuesday, the airline announced its adding a new seating arrangement to a row on its Economy Plus cabin that aims to give passengers a more comfortable experience....

item.title: Judgement intelligence is about to become the skill of the future
item.description: In the age of AI, the winners will be those who can interpret and apply information. For decades, the world of work rewarded the people with the most knowledge. The experts had the most competitive advantage. Right now, an abundance of information is changing that. And easy access means the people can make sense of knowledge faster, at the right time, and apply it to the right problems are the real winners. Don’t get me wrong. We will always need experts. But as the world increasingly depends on intelligent tools, knowing what to do with all that output, and what to ignore, is vital. It’s what...

item.title: The OLED Xbox Ally X20 is so good, Asus will sell it solo
item.description: When I first told you about the "OLED Xbox Ally X of my dreams," I had to curb my enthusiasm a bit. That's partly because I hadn't yet tried the handheld myself, and partly because Asus was only planning to sell it bundled with a pair of expensive AR glasses! I'm happy to say both […]

item.title: An OLED version of the Switch 2 could start production in 2027
item.description: New rumors suggest Nintendo is considering an OLED version of the Switch 2, though production is still years away.

item.title: YouTube and X Have Become ‘Gateways’ to Nudify Apps
item.description: A new study found that social media platforms are referring people to sites where they can create nonconsensual, sexually explicit deepfakes for as little as $1 an image.

item.title: How to watch The Great British Sewing Bee season 12 online for FREE – stream cosy competition from anywhere
item.description: New host Sophie Willan welcomes 12 more contestants to battle it out for the title of most sensational seamster. Here's how to watch The Great British Sewing Bee season 12 online from anywhere.

item.title: 'A single entry point can rapidly expand to greater enterprise impacts': Microsoft introduces changes to tackle ShinyHunters
item.description: Greater visibility, better detection, and stronger governance over OAuth-connected applications should mitigate ShinyHunters attacks.

item.title: How to watch France vs Spain: Free Streams, TV Channels & Kick-Off time for FIFA World Cup semi-final 2026
item.description: Here's how to watch France vs Spain for free online and from anywhere in a heavyweight semi-final at FIFA World Cup 2026.

item.title: An Apple Arcade version of Madden NFL 27 will arrive on August 7
item.description: EA's football sim series is making its debut on Apple Arcade.

item.title: Galaxy S26 Ultra : une tache rouge s’installe sur l’écran, Samsung ouvre une enquête
item.description: Plusieurs propriétaires du Galaxy S26 Ultra voient une tache rouge apparaître au centre de leur écran, des mois après l'achat. Samsung a ouvert une enquête, et tout indique que sa nouvelle techno d'écran anti-espion pourrait être en cause.

item.title: The 'absolutely superb' Bambu Lab P2S we tested in our workshop just dropped in price
item.description: We called this CoreXY 3D printer "exceptionally refined" after our our workshop tests.

item.title: The Google Images homepage will recommend photos even before you search
item.description: Google is announcing a big change to the Google Images homepage in honor of the platform's 25th anniversary this week. Instead of a mostly blank page with a search bar, the homepage will soon show you a bunch of images that it thinks you might like before you even start searching. The company says the […]

item.title: Google Images gets a Pinterest-like redesign focused on discovery
item.description: Now, when users navigate to Google Images, they'll see a "For You" gallery of images tailored to their interests and browsing history.

item.title: Google Images is getting a makeover for its 25th anniversary
item.description: Google has updated Images to surface results 'intelligently tailored to your unique interests."

item.title: Nasa : voici la stupéfiante prouesse technique réalisée pour la future flotte d'hélicoptères martiens
item.description: Franchir le mur du son sur Mars sans briser ses pales : c'est l'exploit que viennent de réussir les ingénieurs de la Nasa. Cette prouesse ouvre la voie à une nouvelle génération d'hélicoptères martiens, plus lourds, plus endurants, capables d'emporter de vrais instruments scientifiques.

item.title: Oppo Find X9 Ultra vs iPhone 17 Pro Max : comment choisir le meilleur smartphone ?
item.description: Le dernier d'Oppo taille des croupières à toute la concurrence… même à l'iPhone 17 Pro Max ? C'est la question qu'on va se poser dans ce nouveau comparatif, pour vous aider à choisir le meilleur smartphone ultra haut de gamme.

item.title: Olive Gardens legendary Never-Ending Pasta Pass is here: How to secure yours
item.description: The Olive Garden Never-Ending Pasta Pass is back this summer. Lock in yours Thursday, July 16 for $100 and enjoy unlimited pasta.

item.title: Parler à l’IA au bureau crée un tel brouhaha que le masque antibruit fait son apparition
item.description: Dans certaines startups de la Silicon Valley, on ne tape plus, on parle à son assistant IA. Et pour ne pas transformer l’open space en marché aux poissons, un accessoire refait surface : le masque antibruit.

item.title: Samsung users report bizarre Galaxy S26 Ultra defect
item.description: Some Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra phones have allegedly developed a reddish tint on the display, users report.

item.title: Spotify is now an AI chatbot, too
item.description: Spotify is experimenting with a new AI feature that allows Premium subscribers to play and explore music, audiobooks, and podcasts by having conversations with a chatbot. The "Talk to Spotify" feature appears across the Home and Now Playing view on Spotify's mobile app. You can interact with the chatbot by typing your request in the […]

item.title: Is the Nintendo Switch 2 a hit or a flop? Despite high sales, the console's been relatively contentious — and I have a feeling I know why
item.description: Tell us what you think about Nintendo’s new console, just over a year after its release.

item.title: Leaked Google Pixel Watch 5 images show four different color options
item.description: Google is expected to officially reveal the Pixel Watch 5 on August 12.

item.title: ‘All the analog features you could wish for’: this is one of the most adjustable analog keyboards I’ve come across — but there’s one area where its rivals win out
item.description: The MelGeek Made68 Ultra V2 is a solid and sturdy analog keyboard — but does it live up to its price tag?

item.title: Upgrade your PC with $43 off the ASUS Tuf Gaming 1000W Gold power supply
item.description: As of July 14, save $43 on the ASUS Tuf Gaming 1000W Gold power supply at Amazon.

item.title: Techland cancels PS4 and Xbox One versions of Dying Light: The Beast — 'It became clear that bringing the game to those platforms would require compromises that would prevent us from delivering the experience we set out to create'
item.description: Techland has announced that Dying Light: The Beast will no longer be released for last-generation consoles.

item.title: Les soldes d’été touchent à leur fin : voici les ultimes offres à saisir
item.description: Les soldes d’été touchent à leur fin : c’est l’ultime occasion de faire de bonnes affaires avant la fin ! Il ne vous reste plus qu'une semaine pour en profiter et renouveler votre équipement (smartphones, TV, PC portables, tablettes, objets connectés…). On continue de faire le tri pour vous proposer en temps réel les meilleures pépites Tech que l'on voit passer. ...

item.title: LAPD hits pause on Flock surveillance cameras due to 'serious concerns around civil liberties and privacy' — as the backlash continues to grow
item.description: Police are turning on Flock cameras as privacy concerns continue to grow

item.title: If you're still on a single monitor, this is the best workflow upgrade you can make
item.description: This simple, and sometimes free, change will enhance both your productivity and entertainment.

item.title: The $99 Fitbit Inspire 3 minimalist fitness tracker is now just $66
item.description: The Fitbit Inspire 3 is down to a best-ever price of $66.45 at Amazon. That's 34% off its list price of $99.95.

item.title: C’est le grand déstockage chez la Fnac et Darty : voici les 12 meilleures offres à saisir avant la fin des soldes
item.description: Les soldes d’été entrent dans leur dernière semaine et la Fnac comme Darty ont décidé de vider définitivement leurs stocks ! C’est l’ultime occasion de faire de bonnes affaires avant la fermeture des rayons promotionnels. Pour vous faire gagner du temps, nous avons sélectionné les dernières offres qui valent vraiment le coup avant la fin.

item.title: Les « foo fighters » escortaient les avions sans les attaquer : l’étrange énigme des boules lumineuses pendant WWII
item.description: Durant la Seconde Guerre mondiale, des pilotes alliés, allemands et japonais ont signalé d’étranges sphères lumineuses qui suivaient leurs appareils. Une nouvelle hypothèse avance que certains de ces « foo fighters » pourraient être des plasmas poussiéreux nés de météores.

item.title: Xiaomi présente les Redmi Note 17 et 17 Pro : écran géant, batterie géante
item.description: Redmi a officialisé ses Note 17 et Note 17 Pro en Chine ce 14 juillet. Deux smartphones milieu de gamme qui misent notamment sur une batterie XXL et un prix attractif.

item.title: X admits its broken algorithm made the site feel like a ‘battleground’
item.description: X's head of product, Nikita Bier, admitted in a post on Monday that X's algorithm was "missing" data about surfacing posts from people who you've followed back. Now, he says a tweak will "boost visibility of your posts to your mutuals," hopefully enhancing the sense of community instead of highlighting and spreading random arguments, but […]

item.title: New York State halts construction of all new data centers
item.description: New York has become the first state to temporarily halt approval of large data centers, as Gov. Kathy Hochul argues the AI-driven building boom shouldn’t come at the expense of higher electricity costs, water supplies, or local control.
